title: Senior Doctor - BLK-Max Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - BLK-Max Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BLK-Max Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Doctor to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About BLK-Max Hospital:
BLK-Max Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BLK-Max Hospital!
